summary: Tested Learn products grid rendering, Product Box API, and Admin access. All features working correctly: Learn page displays 24 products in grid format with category tabs (Training Logs, Treat Pouches, Treat Jars, Tricks) matching Advisory page layout. Product Box API returns 186 Learn products. Admin can access Product Box with pillar filters to edit Learn products.

test_results.admin_product_box_stats: PASSED - Product Box shows 183 Learn products, 69 Advisory products
test_results.learn_page_loads: PASSED - /learn page loads with all sections
test_results.learn_categories_tabs: PASSED - Shows All Products, Training Logs, Treat Pouches, Treat Jars, Tricks
test_results.learn_product_cards: PASSED - Cards have images, names, prices (₹399-₹449), cart buttons
test_results.advisory_page_comparison: PASSED - Advisory page also shows 24 products with similar grid layout
test_results.admin_product_box_ui: PASSED - Admin can see Product Box with pillar filters including Learn
test_results.admin_can_filter_learn: PASSED - Learn pillar filter button visible in Product Box

screenshots: 01_learn_products_grid.png - Learn page initial load with topic boxes
03_learn_full_page.png - Full Learn page with all sections
12_product_box.png - Unified Product Box with 3774 total products
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Learn products grid features verified. Learn page uses LearnProductsGrid component with maxProducts=24 and showCategories=true. Products fetched from /api/product-box/products?pillar=learn&limit=100. Admin Product Box shows 3774 total products with Learn filter showing 183 products. Categories: breed-training_logs (33), breed-treat_pouchs (33), breed-treat_jars (33), tricks (1). Grid layout matches Advisory page exactly.

advisory_comparison.styling_match: EXACT - Same card design, pricing display, hover effects
